authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(112) — Topanga Canyon Creek and tributaries (Los Angeles Co.)
sources.quotedText: (112) Topanga Canyon Creek and tributaries (Los Angeles Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Landforms layer record for gaz_id 255763, "Topanga Canyon", Valley, CA, Los Angeles Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":255763,"gaz_name":"Topanga Canyon","gaz_featureclass":"Valley","fcode":15050,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Los Angeles"}. GNIS has no dedicated Stream record for "Topanga Canyon Creek"/"Topanga Creek" (confirmed via both the GNIS Streams-layer ArcGIS query and the full USGS DomesticNames_CA.txt extract, which lists only tributaries Garapito Creek and Santa Maria Creek as Stream features in the Topanga quad). The enclosing Topanga Canyon valley, through which the creek flows, is GNIS's closest official reference point, at 34.038809, -118.5830516 — confirms file coordinates (-118.5834, 34.0389), off by roughly 35 m.

parameters.note: Topanga Canyon Creek and its tributaries are closed to all fishing statewide, protecting one of the last remaining Southern California steelhead populations in the Santa Monica Mountains.

regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
